body.title: [sprint] Pre-existing: legacy mode=openrouter/ollama direct-dispatch path + its 10 tests are red
body.description:
**Problem (pre-existing, found during T-inference-pin-gate-enforce):** the legacy direct-dispatch fallback in InferenceDevice.dispatch (the `mode=openrouter`/`mode=ollama` path that fires when the rules engine returns no decision) no longer reaches its mocked HTTP call — routing with an empty SourceRegistry fails first and returns a 'no live source' error before the legacy `_or_call`/`_ollama_call` path runs. 10 tests in tests/test_inference_via_bus.py (TestDispatchOpenRouter/TestDispatchOllama) + tests/test_budget_gate.py assert the legacy path returns mocked content and are RED. Confirmed pre-existing: they fail at 94f9c17c (before the domain-routing batch) — NOT caused by domain-tag/domain-prompt/migrate-pinners/pin-gate. **Proposed shape:** decide whether the legacy direct-mode dispatch path is still wanted now that all inference routes by {domain, task_class} through the rules engine. If retained: fix so a mode-based dispatch reaches its provider (or register a mode source so routing resolves). If retired: delete the dead path + update/remove the tests to assert the domain-routing contract instead. **Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/inference/device.py (legacy mode branch), tests/test_inference_via_bus.py, tests/test_budget_gate.py. **Design rules:** NO SQLITE; ALL inference through the Proxy; route by {domain, task_class}. **Scope boundary:** IN: the legacy mode-dispatch path + its red tests. OUT: domain routing / pin-gate (already shipped). **Test plan:** the 10 currently-red tests either pass (path fixed) or are replaced by domain-routing-contract tests; no NEW reds. **Completion criteria:** legacy-mode dispatch decision made and executed; the 10 red tests resolved; suite green for these files.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.intention: I intend that every inference dispatch has exactly one live, tested path (route by domain through the Proxy) — no vestigial direct-mode branch that silently fails and leaves tests red.
